welcome_offer.description: Atmos Rewards Ascent Visa Signature: get 70,000 bonus points and a $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) after spending $2,500 or more on purchases within the first 90 days of opening your account.
notes: Official Bank of America product/search result shows current Ascent public offer: 70,000 bonus points + $99 Companion Fare after $2,500/90 days.
Replaces stale/expired 2026-06-30 Alaska offer values; no current public expiry date was visible in fetched/searchable issuer evidence.

open_questions: Confirm whether 2026-06-30 expiry is still correct or whether offer extended/changed.

Ascent regular Bank of America public page currently shows a lower 50k + companion fare offer; 85k appears to be special/elevated link/secondary-source offer and should not be treated as guaranteed public baseline.
Refresh official issuer/apply source before promoting this offer; expired 2026-06-30 values must not be applied as current/elevated.
